# Leflunomide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Leflunomide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Leflunomide</strong> 目前有 <strong>22 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Leflunomide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Leflunomide is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with:  active rheumatoid arthritis as a 'disease-modifying antirheumatic drug' (DMARD); active psoriatic arthritis.  Recent or concurrent...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（100.0%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（95.5%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（95.2%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（93.0%）</li>
<li>Meester-Loeys syndrome（86.5%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（76.3%）</li>
<li>WHIM syndrome（75.9%）</li>
<li>scalp dermatosis（73.9%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（72.2%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（71.4%）</li>
<li>obsolete susceptibility to ischemic stroke（70.5%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（64.8%）</li>
<li>gout（63.9%）</li>
<li>polydipsia（62.1%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（61.7%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（60.3%）</li>
<li>anuria（59.2%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis susceptibility（57.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/leflunomide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
